description: Migration v6 guarded vision workflow plan for reviewed capture recording, rebased standard-position transitions, and bounded offset correction.

machine_coordinate_system.machine_z_um: Align_Z horizontal transverse axis in the top view
machine_coordinate_system.machine_y_um: Align_Y vertical transverse axis from the mirror side view

calibration.source: vision recognition lab fixed rectangle short edge calibration
calibration.view_transforms_status: top signs follow v5 placeholders; side view is treated as a mirror and flips image y before machine-y correction

physical_constants_um.height_assumption: chip top / laser rectangle plane is y=0; ball rests on trench bottom, so ball center = ball_radius - trench_depth

sequence_geometry_memory.method: remember rectangle corners from top reference focus and ball circle from top ball focus, then compare them in the unchanged top-view camera x/z frame and output machine_coordinates_um
fail_closed_requirements: Reference capture must have one selected laser/reference rectangle.
Top ball-focus capture must have one selected ball circle.
Reference and top ball-focus captures must have unchanged camera x/z unless a calibrated registration is supplied.
Machine y defaults to the explicit trench-depth model until a reviewed side-view vertical reference is selected.
Auto side-reference height is reported as a diagnostic candidate unless machine_y_source is explicitly set to side_reference.

sequence_capture_memory.purpose: Durably record each capture's saved vision session, image path, and queried machine_positions_um before solving.
sequence_capture_memory.next_action_command: Return the next required capture, missing official baseline, or solve_ready status with machine_positions_um targets only.
sequence_capture_memory.next_motion_or_capture_command: Return one flat YASE-friendly final workflow action from live machine positions: move_to_next_capture with stage1/target1_um, capture_review_record_required, or solve_ready.
sequence_capture_memory.focus_plane_memory: Focused records remember camera.y by feature height. next_action reports same-height focus guidance and only applies it to machine_positions_um when apply_remembered_focus_planes is true.
sequence_capture_memory.standard_evidence_command: python_vision_geometry/standard_capture_evidence.py reports detected v4 image features, focus planes, same-camera gross motion rank, gross-to-close machine deltas, and final machine_coordinates_um.
sequence_capture_memory.position_override_rule: If a capture record includes machine_positions_um, those live positions override the standard v4 position payload for that capture.
sequence_capture_memory.motion_policy: Python records data and chooses the next flat action. The guarded final YASE wrapper may move only by calling SUB_ApplyDefaultPositionMove; image capture stays in SUB_V5CaptureReviewRecord_ReadOnly.

top_xz.description: Direct top view. Use for in-plane ball position relative to laser/chip reference.

mirror_side_xy.description: Bottom mirror side/profile view. The mirror is visible in the camera image and is vertically mirrored: the trench-bottom/chip-side direction appears at the top of the mirror.

auto_gross_detection.purpose: detect coarse gross ball center in known v4 ROIs before planning close-focus positions
auto_gross_detection.motion_policy: bounded tower-only proposal; no automatic hardware motion

notes: Use 2.1 and 4.1 only to estimate a bounded correction before moving to close focus positions.
The bias is applied only to the active ball tower; camera, zoom, exposure, and focus settings remain the reviewed standard close-position values.
Do not apply an unbounded vision-derived move.
Bias plans are read-only/operator-review proposals unless bias_mapping_evidence.use_for_motion is explicitly true from a validated calibration.

steps.label: ball_1_gross_dual_view
steps.purpose: Confirm ball 1 is reachable and estimate coarse top/side offset before close views.

steps.label: ball_1_laser_reference_top_focus
steps.purpose: Measure the laser/chip reference in the best top-focus plane.

steps.label: ball_1_top_ball_focus
steps.purpose: Measure ball 1 in-plane center relative to the laser/chip reference.

steps.label: ball_1_mirror_side_height
steps.purpose: Measure ball 1 height from the mirror side/profile view.

steps.label: ball_2_gross_dual_view
steps.purpose: Confirm ball 2 is reachable and estimate coarse top/side offset before close views.

steps.label: ball_2_laser_reference_top_focus
steps.purpose: Measure the laser/chip reference in the best top-focus plane.

steps.label: ball_2_top_ball_focus
steps.purpose: Measure ball 2 in-plane center relative to the laser/chip reference.

steps.label: ball_2_mirror_side_height
steps.purpose: Measure ball 2 height from the mirror side/profile view using the brighter side-profile settings.

fail_closed_requirements: Every precise top/side capture used for geometry must include relative_measurement.
Every precise ball must have top_xz and mirror_side_xy observations.
Repeated axis disagreement must be at or below max_axis_disagreement_um.
No direct MoveStage may be issued from this plan; motion must go through the reviewed guarded YASE apply layer.
